notfound.title: Page not found
notfound.desc: The page you are looking for might have been removed, had its name changed, or is temporarily unavailable.

error.title: System error occurred
error.desc: Something went wrong. Don't worry, it's not your fault. Try refreshing the page.

guide.title: Script Guide
guide.hint_1: Javanese script is an abugida. Each character has an inherent 'a' sound.
guide.hint_2: Modifiers (Sandhangan) are used to change or mute that vowel.

puzzle.title: Puzzle Mode
puzzle.finish_alert: Finished! You've mastered the basic Hanacaraka clusters!
